section.heading: Relationship to other incentives and pays

subsection.heading: Treatment.—
subsection.content: A bonus or incentive pay paid to a member of the uniformed services under subchapter II is in addition to any other pay and allowance to which a member is entitled, unless otherwise provided under this chapter.

subsection.heading: Exception.—
subsection.content: A member may not receive a bonus or incentive pay under both subchapter I and subchapter II for the same activity, skill, or period of service.

subsection.heading: Relationship to Other Computations.—
subsection.chapeau: The amount of a bonus or incentive pay to which a member is entitled under subchapter II may not be included in computing the amount of—

paragraph.content: any increase in pay authorized by any other provision of this title; or
any retired pay, retainer pay, separation pay, or disability severance pay.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 110–181, div. A, title VI, § 661(a)(2), Jan. 28, 2008, 122 Stat. 176.)
